hero.name: John Dexter V. Francisco
hero.title: Full-Stack Developer & CS Graduate
hero.intro: Hi, I'm Dexter — a Fresh Graduate CompSci Student. I build practical web systems and love learning emerging tech. Nice to meet you!

about: Recent Bachelor of Science in Computer Science graduate with a growing understanding of software development, web technologies, and database management. Eager to build practical solutions and continue learning emerging technologies, including AI-assisted development tools. Experienced in developing web-based systems using HTML, CSS, Tailwind CSS, Bootstrap, JavaScript, Node.js, Express.js, PHP, and MySQL through academic projects and professional internship experience. A Dean's Lister and motivated problem solver seeking opportunities to apply technical skills while continuing to grow as a software developer.

experience.title: Information Technology Department Intern
experience.description: Interned at LGU Candelaria IT Department. Developed a Work Log Management System for tracking office tasks and staff activities.

projects.title: MeritUp — Web-Based Merit Evaluation
projects.description: A web-based evaluation system for employees to track and view their merit points based on performance.

projects.title: IT Log Management System
projects.description: A work log management system that tracks all office tasks, repairs, and equipment borrows in the IT department.

achievements.title: Dean's List 2024
achievements.description: Awarded for academic excellence in Computer Science.

achievements.title: Dean's List 2025
achievements.description: Consecutive recognition for maintaining high academic standing.
